title: Party alliance dimension row (per-event)
description: Logical contract for one row of datasets/elections/dim_party_alliances.parquet. One row per (party_id, period_label) pair where an alliance is declared in datasets/taxonomy/parties.json's alliance_history[]. Alliance is per-event (e.g. DMK was 'UPA' in 2019, 'SPA' in 2026), so it lives on its own dim table rather than as a column on dim_parties (party identity). The view-model layer LEFT JOINs this on (party_id, period_label) so parties without an entry render with alliance=NULL. Sub-phase 1.3d of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md (PR-H).

x-changelog.description: Initial dim_party_alliances schema. Composite PK = (party_id, period_label). Columns: party_id FK -> dim_parties, short_name (denormalised for JOIN debugging), period_label (election event), alliance (nullable -- explicit non-aligned this event), source_id FK -> sources.

party_id.description: FK -> dim_parties.party_id. Half of the composite PK.

short_name.description: Display abbreviation, denormalised from dim_parties for JOIN-free debugging of the alliance table.

period_label.description: Election event id (e.g. 'AcGenMay2026'). Half of the composite PK.

alliance.description: Alliance name as declared in alliance_history[] for that event (e.g. 'SPA', 'NDA', 'UDF', 'LDF'). NULL means an explicit 'non-aligned this event' entry was authored; absence of any row means alliance was never declared and the view-model also returns NULL.

source_id.description: FK -> taxonomy/sources.parquet. The provenance row backing the alliance_history entry.
